metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins: skills, agents, hooks, and commands for development workflows.

plugins.name: gh-sdlc
plugins.description: Slightly overkilled GitHub SDLC workflow: issue, project, branch, commit, PR, merge, track. Includes 5 policy skills and an autonomous shipping agent.

plugins.name: ccgraft
plugins.description: Export, import, and restore Claude Code sessions. Portable session sharing and archival.
